treks.name: Tarsar Marsar Trek
highlights: Marsar Lake viewpoint 700 ft above the lake
ideal_for: Experienced trekkers seeking a relaxed scenic trek

seasonal_notes.early_july: Snow patches at higher camps, flowing streams, lakes turning deep blue
seasonal_notes.mid_july_august: Peak bloom season with lush meadows and mirror-like lakes
seasonal_notes.late_august_early_september: Golden meadows, crisp air, deep blue skies

treks.name: Kashmir Great Lakes Trek
highlights: Six alpine lakes across five valleys
Long trekking days with steep ascents and descents
Vast Himalayan landscapes with wildflower meadows
treks.ideal_for: Experienced trekkers seeking a challenging high-altitude Himalayan classic

seasonal_notes.early_july: Snow patches and partially frozen lakes
seasonal_notes.mid_july_august: Best conditions with lush meadows and blue lakes
seasonal_notes.late_august_mid_september: Crisp air, golden meadows, sharp views before snowfall

treks.name: Nafran Valley Trek
highlights: Deep-blue glacial lakes with snow patches
treks.ideal_for: Experienced trekkers seeking a less-crowded but visually rich Kashmir trek

seasonal_notes.early_july: Partially frozen lakes and snow-covered upper reaches
seasonal_notes.mid_july_august: Blooming meadows and thawed turquoise lakes
seasonal_notes.late_august_early_september: Golden meadows and deep blue skies

treks.name: Pir Panjal Lakes Trek
highlights: Dense forests transitioning to vast alpine meadows
Numerous alpine lakes in varied shades of blue
Highly diverse terrain in a short duration
treks.ideal_for: Experienced trekkers seeking an offbeat, grand Kashmir adventure

seasonal_notes.end_june_mid_july: Melting snow and floating ice in high lakes
seasonal_notes.mid_july_early_september: Lush meadows and fully thawed lakes
seasonal_notes.late_august: Golden meadows and deep blue skies before snowfall

treks.name: Tulian Lake Trek
highlights: Dense pine, fir, and spruce forests
treks.ideal_for: Trekkers seeking a short yet complete Kashmir trekking experience

seasonal_notes.may_mid_june: Snow-lined trails and partially frozen lake
seasonal_notes.september_october: Golden landscapes, crisp air, excellent photography conditions
